scripts.dev: concurrently -n ui,dash -c magenta,yellow --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:dash"
scripts.dev:paper: concurrently -n agent,ui,dash -c cyan,magenta,yellow --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:agent:paper" "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:dash"
scripts.dev:live: concurrently -n agent,ui,dash -c cyan,magenta,yellow --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:agent:live" "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:dash"
scripts.build: cargo build --release && npm run build -w flow-theatre
